elements.original_description: A small green plant sprout on a pure white background, symbolizing initial growth. The plant has two tiny leaves. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a small green plant sprout with two tiny leaves, clean flat vector art on a pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients, symbolizing initial growth, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, crisp edges, vibrant green color, simple and elegant design.
